title: CBIC Revises IGST Rates for Specified Beverages Under Finance Act 2026 (Notification No. 01/2026-Integrated Tax (Rate))
content:
# CBIC Revises IGST Rates for Specified Beverages Under Finance Act 2026 (Notification No. 01/2026-Integrated Tax (Rate))

Ek important update hai! Government ne Finance Act, 2026 ke तहत Integrated Goods and Services Tax (IGST) rates se related ek naya notification (Notification No. 01/2026-Integrated Tax (Rate)) announce kiya hai.

Yeh notification, dated April 30, 2026, existing Notification No. 09/2025-Integrated Tax (Rate) ko amend karta hai, jisse tariff entries Finance Act, 2026 mein kiye gaye changes ke saath align ho sakein.

*   **What's Changed:** Is amendment se specific beverage categories ke liye IGST rates revise kiye gaye hain.
*   **Specifics:** Schedule I (5% IGST) aur Schedule III (40% IGST) ke under aane wale kuch Harmonized System of Nomenclature (HSN) codes mein changes kiye gaye hain. Jaise ki, HSN codes 2202 99 21, 2202 99 29, 2202 99 31, 2202 99 39, 2202 99 90, 2202 99 91, aur 2202 99 99 se related entries ko substitute ya reclassify kiya gaya hai.
*   **Effective Date:** Yeh amendments 1st May, 2026 se effective ho gaye hain.
*   **Purpose:** The objective is to align the Integrated Goods and Services Tax framework with the updated tariff structure introduced by the Finance Act, 2026.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification here](https://www.cbic.gov.in/resources//htdocs-cbec/gst/Notification-01-2026-IGST-Rate.pdf)

*Published on: 3 May 2026*
